subcodes.first_line: At all times have ye dwelt beneath the sheltering grace of the All-Possessing, the Most High, and the glance of His bounty hath been directed towards you - this is the root of all kinship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال در ظل عنایت غنی متعال بوده اید و طرف عنایت متوجه شما بوده اصل نسبتها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels
